name: p0-bathroom-drain-blocked
description: The shower drain in our main bathroom is blocked. Water stands ankle-deep when we run the shower and takes over an hour to drain by itself. Plunged it — no effect. Photo attached showing the standing water around the drain grate.

hypotheses.label: Drain blocked by hair/soap/scum accumulation
evidence_for: Standing water + slow drain in a shower is the dominant blockage cause
Plunger ineffective is consistent with a soft hair-scum mass below the grate
Photo confirms a single fixture is affected (other drains not mentioned)

hypotheses.label: P-trap obstruction further down the line
evidence_for: P-trap blockages produce similar symptoms when the trap fills with solids
evidence_against: Plunger usually clears a soft P-trap blockage; persistence after plunge points closer to the grate

hypotheses.label: Main waste line blockage affecting this bathroom only
evidence_for: Possible if the bathroom drains into a partially blocked branch
evidence_against: No other fixtures reported as draining slowly

mockAgentOutput.what_we_dont_know: Whether the blockage is at the grate or deeper in the waste pipe — affects whether the contractor can clear it manually or needs a drain machine.
mockAgentOutput.why_it_matters: Surface-level hair clogs are a quick visit; deeper P-trap or branch blockages may need machine cleaning.

chips.text: Removed the grate and can see hair/scum just below.
Other drains in the house are also slow.
Bad smell or gurgling from the drain.

explicit_unknowns: whether the issue is the trap or further down the line

expected.must_ask_about: whether removing the grate reveals visible debris

failure_baseline_today.observed_behaviour: System commits to 'Blocked drain' but with confidence ~78 and a generic clarification still attached, prompting an extra round before the user can see contractors.
failure_baseline_today.why_it_fails: Drain blockage from a single fixture with standing water in a clear photo should score >85 on every facet. The single-integer confidence is being pulled down by an over-cautious 'cause is uncertain' factor.

expected.phase_6_commit_rationale: Top hypothesis confidence_alone=0.88 (>=0.75), gap to second=0.33 (>=0.25), evidence_for has 3 entries, evidence_against empty. Photo + symptom uniquely implicate a localised blockage.
